oai_response.prompt:
Here is code in Python 3 programming lanaguge. Translate the following code from Python 3 to C programming lanaguge. Do not output any extra description or tokens other than the translated code. 

a = int(input())
print(2**(a+1)-2)||END-of-SRC||

source_data.prob_desc_input_spec: The only line of input contains one integer n (1 ≤ n ≤ 55) — the maximum length of a number that a door-plate can hold.
source_data.prob_desc_output_spec: Output one integer — the maximum number of offices, than can have unique lucky numbers not longer than n digits.
source_data.prob_desc_description: The numbers of all offices in the new building of the Tax Office of IT City will have lucky numbers.Lucky number is a number that consists of digits 7 and 8 only. Find the maximum number of offices in the new building of the Tax Office given that a door-plate can hold a number not longer than n digits.
